title: [Arc][arcilator] `hw.bitcast` Data Corruption for Aggregate Types with Non-Power-of-2 Element Widths in Arc

features.name: struct with non-power-of-2 bit width fields
features.description: Code should include a struct type with fields having non-power-of-2 bit widths (e.g., 17-bit, 33-bit fields)
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic [16:0] x; logic [16:0] y; } non_pow2_struct_t;

features.name: array with non-power-of-2 bit width elements
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array with elements having non-power-of-2 bit widths

features.name: bitstream cast round-trip with non-power-of-2 aggregate
features.description: Code should include a bitstream cast operation from aggregate to integer type and back, using non-power-of-2 width elements
